Overrides.Override: +1 to Level of all non-Exceptional Support Gems Limited to 1 Runegraft of Gemcraft
10% reduced Attributes 40% increased Global Defences Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Fortress

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Foulborn Aegis Aurora Champion Kite Shield Armour: 1428 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.7787 Energy Shield: 292 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.8432 Unique ID: 199f4aa725220f4c3c88d9a95e2fe503c30a6690165771d5369ebf0dc4f7ad59 Item Level: 83 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-G LevelReq: 62 Implicits: 2 5% Chance to Block Spell Damage You take 27% reduced Extra Damage from Critical Strikes 396% increased Armour and Energy Shield +10% to all Elemental Resistances +5% to maximum Cold Resistance +6% Chance to Block Recover Energy Shield equal to 2% of Armour when you Block {mutated}Damage cannot be Reflected Corrupted
